author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

New Fiat On-Ramp - Topper

Purchase ATLAS directly with fiat through the Galactic Marketplace - now with Topper! 

 Connect a wallet at https://play.staratlas.com/
 Launch Topper at the bottom of the "Manage Wallet" pop-up
 Complete purchase

Getting the essence of the Star Atlas economy has never been easier.
